yad-checks

verified-commits · commit-message · pr-title · pr-template
lineage-check · epic-open · reconcile-debt
yad-update-guard (push-on-default)

span.p:
yad checkpoint --push
commit trust-log · build-log · build-state
chore(hub) · default branch · allowlist-scoped

span.p:
yad tidy up --push
fold a shipped story's trust-log · build-log shards
into the folded ledger (loose objects → git gc)

span.p:
yad-stub
brownfield: feature with no epic
mint stub genesis (kind:feature · stub:backfill-pending)
yad-backfill promote → verified feature epic

span.p:
yad-change
intake + triage depth
seed threaded change-epic (kind/parent/thread)
inherit by reference · re-author only what changes
